name: the pre-write governor denies the app-code edit before save, leaving the on-disk file unchanged
command:
printf 'const y: number = 1;
' > app.ts && printf '%s' '{"tool_name":"Edit","tool_input":{"file_path":"app.ts","old_string":"number","new_string":"any"}}' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/enforce-standards-pre-write.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1; grep -q 'number' app.ts && ! grep -q ': any' app.ts && echo app-file-unchanged 1>&2
